name: flow-02-personalization-broadcast
description: T52 PersonalizationBroadcast — BROADCAST archetype. Consent-gated broadcast of PersonalizationCompleted (MACHINE literal). NODE C accepts 4 optional inputs with named fallbacks. FLOW-02 owns 'PersonalizationCompleted'; FLOW-01 owns 'OnboardingCompleted' — literals must not collide.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: machine-literal-event-type, independent-fallback-inputs, broadcast-consent-gated
Retrieve BROADCAST arch pattern + completion-event-distinct-per-flow + degradable-analytics patterns for T52
Break T52 into: NODE C (collect 4 optional signals with fallbacks) + NODE D (consent gate + PersonalizationCompleted emit with MACHINE literal)

Generate personalization-completion.service.ts: PersonalizationCompleted as 'as const' MACHINE literal (never 'OnboardingCompleted'), 4 optional inputs each with named fallback, consent gate (private mode: store but skip enqueue), DNA-8: storeDocument before enqueue.
Named check validation: machine_literal_event_type, independent_fallback_inputs, broadcast_consent_gated
Score generated code 0-100 against T52 iron rules: literal correctness, fallback completeness, consent gate presence, DNA-8 ordering
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate

DPO triple: chosen=machine-literal-with-consent (PersonalizationCompleted as const, consent gate, 4 fallbacks), rejected=computed-type-no-consent (event type from variable, no privacy check, required inputs). curriculumTier=3.
